---
title: "07 AB Response"
output: 
---

01_Data_Prep.Rmd generates the data used below.

# Setup

```{r}


library('tidyverse')
library('here')
library('weights')
library('miceadds')

```
# Helper Functions

```{r}
add_asterisk_if_significant <- function(coef, se) {
  # Calculate the z-score
  z <- abs(coef / se)
  # Calculate the two-tailed p-value
  p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(z))
  # Add an asterisk if p-value < 0.01
  if (p_value < 0.10) {
    return(paste0(format(round(coef, 3), nsmall = 3), "*"))
  } else {
    return(format(round(coef, 3), nsmall = 3))
  }
}

add_asterisk_if_significant_cluster <- function(coef, se) {
  # Calculate the z-score
  z <- abs(coef / se)
  # Calculate the two-tailed p-value
  p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(z))
  # Add an asterisk if p-value < 0.10
  if (p_value < 0.10) {
    return(paste0(format(round(coef, 3), nsmall = 3), "*"))
  } else {
    return(format(round(coef, 3), nsmall = 3))
  }
}

add_asterisk_if_significant_by_row <- function(table, coef_rows, significance_level = 0.10) {
  # Loop over each specified coefficient row
  for (row in coef_rows) {
    # Loop over each cell in the specified row
    for (col in seq_len(ncol(table))) {
      # Try to convert the coefficient to numeric, ignoring non-numeric entries
      coef_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(table[row, col]))
      
      # Proceed only if coef_value is numeric and not NA
      if (!is.na(coef_value)) {
        # Extract the standard error, removing parentheses and converting to numeric
        se_string <- table[row + 1, col]  # Get SE as a string
        se_value <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(gsub("[()]", "", se_string)))  # Remove parentheses and convert to numeric
        
        # Check if the SE is valid before calculating significance
        if (!is.na(se_value)) {
          # Calculate z-score and p-value
          z_score <- abs(coef_value / se_value)
          p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(z_score))
          
          # Add asterisk to coefficient if p-value < significance level
          if (p_value < significance_level) {
            table[row, col] <- paste0(format(coef_value, nsmall = 3), "*")
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  return(table)
}
```


# Data

```{r}

df <- read_rds(here("data", "df.rds"))
df_dyad <- read_csv(here("data", "df_dyad.csv"))

```

# Claim 1. Bi-Variate Correlations

```{r}

# Define the variables to correlate
vars <- c("AME", "pos10s", "neg10s", "group1", "group3", "p12", "p56", "proindex", "pindex")

# Initialize empty matrices for correlations and p-values
n_vars <- length(vars)
cor_matrix <- matrix(NA, n_vars, n_vars, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
p_matrix <- matrix(NA, n_vars, n_vars, dimnames = list(vars, vars))

# Loop through the variables to calculate weighted correlations and p-values
for (i in 1:n_vars) {
  for (j in 1:n_vars) {
    if (i == j) {
      cor_matrix[i, j] <- 1
      p_matrix[i, j] <- 0
    } else {
      # wtd.cor computes the weighted correlation and its p-value
      wt_cor <- wtd.cor(df[[vars[i]]], df[[vars[j]]], weight = df$aw)
      cor_matrix[i, j] <- wt_cor[1, "correlation"]
      p_matrix[i, j] <- wt_cor[1, "p.value"]
    }
  }
}

# Create a function to format to 2 decimal places and apply custom stars
add_stars <- function(cor_val, p_val) {
  stars <- ""
  if (is.na(p_val)) {
    return(NA)
  } else if (p_val < 0.05) {
    stars <- "***"
  } else if (p_val < 0.10) {
    stars <- "**"
  } else if (p_val < 0.20) {
    stars <- "*"
  }
  
  # Format correlation to 2 decimals and append the stars
  paste0(sprintf("%.2f", cor_val), stars)
}

# Apply the formatting function to the matrix
formatted_matrix <- matrix(NA, n_vars, n_vars, dimnames = list(vars, vars))
for (i in 1:n_vars) {
  for (j in 1:n_vars) {
    if (i == j) {
      formatted_matrix[i, j] <- "1.00"
    } else {
      formatted_matrix[i, j] <- add_stars(cor_matrix[i, j], p_matrix[i, j])
    }
  }
}

# Convert to a dataframe and export to CSV
final_df <- as.data.frame(formatted_matrix)
write.csv(final_df, here("data", "01_Claim_weighted_correlations.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

# Print to console to verify
print(final_df)

```
# Claim 5. Team 33 and 47

```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(counter3 = counter,
         counter3 = ifelse(u_teamid %in% c(33, 47), 3005, counter3),
         # make it so that the uncommon disciplines land in one category
         degree3 = case_when(backgr_degree1 %in% c(1, 2, 5, 6) ~ 1,
                             backgr_degree1 == 3 ~ 3,
                             backgr_degree1 == 4 ~ 4,
                             TRUE ~ 2))

# original 3 main models without discipline
m_1 <- lm.cluster(formula=AME ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3, weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1n <- lm.cluster(formula=neg10s ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3, weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1p <- lm.cluster(formula=pos10s ~ group1 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3, weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

# Results with alternative coding of team 33 and 47 as one discipline
m_1c <- lm.cluster(formula=AME ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(counter3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1nc <- lm.cluster(formula=neg10s ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(counter3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1pc <- lm.cluster(formula=pos10s ~ group1 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(counter3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

# Results with three disciplines (sociology, political science, the rest common, and those uncommon or NA)
m_1c3 <- lm.cluster(formula=AME ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(degree3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1nc3 <- lm.cluster(formula=neg10s ~ group3 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(degree3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

m_1pc3 <- lm.cluster(formula=pos10s ~ group1 + stats_brw + topic_brw + t2 + t3 + factor(degree3), weights = 1/df$nmodel, cluster = "u_teamid", data = df)

```

# Table Claim 5.

```{r}

get_formatted_coef <- function(model, var_name) {
  # Extract the summary, which contains the cluster-robust standard errors
  sum_mat <- summary(model)
  
  # Handle different package structures for lm.cluster (e.g., miceadds)
  if (is.matrix(sum_mat) || is.data.frame(sum_mat)) {
    coef_table <- sum_mat
  } else if ("res" %in% names(sum_mat)) {
    coef_table <- sum_mat$res
  } else {
    coef_table <- coef(sum_mat)
  }
  
  # If the variable exists in the model, extract and format
  if (var_name %in% rownames(coef_table)) {
    estimate <- coef_table[var_name, 1] # 1st column: Estimate
    se <- coef_table[var_name, 2]       # 2nd column: Std. Error
    
    # Apply your custom formatting function
    return(add_asterisk_if_significant_cluster(estimate, se))
  } else {
    # Return a dash (or NA) if the variable isn't in this specific model
    return("-") 
  }
}

models <- list(
  "1.AME, no discipline"         = m_1,
  "2.Neg10s, no disc"     = m_1n,
  "3.Pos10s, no disc"     = m_1p,
  "4.AME, 33/47 combined"         = m_1c,
  "5.Neg10s, 33/47 comb"     = m_1nc,
  "6.Pos10s, 33/47 comb"     = m_1pc,
  "7.AME, 4-disciplines"     = m_1c3,
  "8.Neg10s, 4-disc" = m_1nc3,
  "9.Pos10s, 4-disc" = m_1pc3
)

# build the rows
table_data <- lapply(names(models), function(m_name) {
  mod <- models[[m_name]]
  data.frame(
    Model = m_name,
    Group3 = get_formatted_coef(mod, "group3"),
    Group1 = get_formatted_coef(mod, "group1"),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})


results_table <- do.call(rbind, table_data)

write.csv(results_table, file = here("results", "response_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
print(results_table)
```

## Colophon

```{r colo}

sessionInfo()

```
